title: Can you convert a sub item to an item on another board?
excerpt:
Please assist! Is this feature available or can you only convert a subitem to an item on the same board. 
Thanks!

posts.author: CindyDAlonzo (Cindy DAlonzo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please assist! Is this feature available or can you only convert a subitem to an item on the same board.

Thanks!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Cindy! You can only convert a subitem from one board into an item on the same board. However, once you convert it, you can move the item to another board.

Here’s more information on how to do that. I hope this is helpful!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @CindyDAlonzo

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. It also includes the ability to convert subitem to an item in a different board, here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-03-06 at 15.38.412212×404 50.6 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
